post_weld_drilling_applicability: Required (base plate anchor pattern post-SAW assembly)
drilling_method: Magnetic-base drill (Hougen HMD904) with template jig
drilling_location_on_assembly: Base plate bottom flange — 6 anchor holes
hole_pattern_source: Final assembly drawing EPE-J126-U2-S-031 Rev3 base detail
burr_criteria: All hole edges deburred; no sharp protrusions > 1mm
burr_obs: All 6 holes deburred with countersink; no protrusion
distortion_criteria: Member straightness preserved post-drilling, sweep within L/1000
distortion_obs: Sweep measured 3.2mm over 4250mm; well within 4.25mm allowed

photos.title: Base plate template jig set
photos.note: Jig TJ-J126-031 clamped to base plate against datum edge.

photos.title: Drilled hole pattern
photos.note: 6 anchor holes at correct pitch and edge distance.

photos.title: Sweep measurement (3.2mm over 4250mm)
photos.note: Steel tape pulled along bottom flange; deviation gauge confirms 3.2mm.

iqra_review_note: Post-weld base plate drilling clean. No distortion induced. Member passport updated.
stage_passport_feedback: Updated: Post-Weld Drilling Complete for MC-C1; ready for final dimensional release verification.
